Make a copy of a struct. (Even though we initially pass is_owning: false, we then use the copy constructor to produce an owning instance.)
Generated copy constructor.
Constructs an empty (default-constructed) instance.

briefdescription.para: constructs a matrix from its 3 columns; use this method to get the matrix that transforms basis vectors ( plusX, plusY, plusZ ) into vectors ( x, y, z ) respectively Generated from method MR.Matrix3i64.fromColumns.
